title: Fix "podman run port forward range" flake
body:
The test must ensure that all ports in the range are free not just
the first. This flakes often because port 5355 is always in use by
systemd-resolved on fedora.

Fixes #14716

comments.body: Added an extra break to your suggestion since there is no point in trying all ports when one is blocked.
